forward_patch:
--- original
+++ modified
@@ -0,0 +1,33 @@
+---
+assignees:
+- claude-code
+depends_on:
+- 01KW262DJSSC1JX2FXCDQN0X4E
+- 01KW265D8SHMBFYBCZ5QEMBVQ0
+position_column: todo
+position_ordinal: bf80
+project: expect
+title: db + file surface adapters
+---
+## What
+Add the two state surfaces: `db` and `file`. Per `ideas/expect.md` §"Surface adapters" (db/file rows) and the locator table.
+
+- New `crates/swissarmyhammer-expect/src/surface/db.rs` (`SurfaceAdapter`):
+  - Provision: create a fresh database + load a fixture (per `setup:`); teardown drops it.
+  - Drive: run statements; Observe: capture rows/tables. Locator: a SQL query + projection (the locator IS SQL — very stable). Use an in-process Rust DB client (reuse the workspace's sqlite/sqlx if present).
+- New `crates/swissarmyhammer-expect/src/surface/file.rs` (`SurfaceAdapter`):
+  - Provision: a scratch dir. Drive: write. Observe: files/dirs/content. Locator: path + content (+ sub-locator if structured, e.g. json-path into a file).
+- Extend the assertion compiler locator resolution for db (SQL projection) and file (path+content).
+
+## Acceptance Criteria
+- [ ] db adapter provisions a fresh DB, runs statements, and a SQL-projection locator observes the expected rows.
+- [ ] file adapter writes to a scratch dir and a path+content locator (incl. a structured sub-locator) observes file state.
+- [ ] Both are deterministic, run once by default; teardown cleans up.
+
+## Tests
+- [ ] db integration test against an in-memory/temp sqlite fixture: statement → SQL-projection observation.
+- [ ] file integration test in a tempdir: write → path+content + json-sub-locator observation.
+- [ ] `cargo nextest run -p swissarmyhammer-expect db file` passes.
+
+## Workflow
+- Use `/tdd`.
\ No newline at end of file

forward_patch:
--- original
+++ modified
@@ -1,6 +1,21 @@
 ---
 assignees:
 - claude-code
+comments:
+- actor: claude-code
+  id: 01kw4e9rrrh65thygtrz483c6x
+  text: |-
+    Picked up. Plan after research:
+    - DB client = rusqlite (workspace dep, bundled sqlite); SurfaceAdapter trait is sync so rusqlite (sync) fits.
+    - types.rs: additive SurfaceState::Db(DbState{snapshot: SQL dump}) + SurfaceState::File(FileState{files,dirs}).
+    - surface/db.rs: provision fresh sqlite (temp-file default / in_memory), setup: = fixture SQL, drive = run statements, observe = SQL dump snapshot, teardown drops temp dir.
+    - surface/file.rs: provision scratch TempDir, drive dialect `write <path> <content>` / `mkdir <path>` (safe-join, no traversal), observe = walk tree → files+dirs, teardown drops.
+    - assertion.rs locator resolution: Locator::Sql{query} (loads snapshot into in-mem sqlite, projects scalar), Locator::FileContent{path}, Locator::FileJsonPath{path,pointer} (json sub-locator); extend the 5 SurfaceState helper match arms.
+    - ledger.rs scrub_state: add Db/File arms.
+    - Extract shared surface::safe_join (cli safe_output_path delegates).
+    - TDD: tests/db.rs + tests/file.rs integration tests (CompiledAssertion fields are public, so locators built directly).
+    Not attempting prose->SQL/file compilation in compile() — out of scope; locators are hand-authorable per the design's reviewer-edit story.
+  timestamp: 2026-06-27T11:44:05.912146+00:00
 depends_on:
 - 01KW262DJSSC1JX2FXCDQN0X4E
 - 01KW265D8SHMBFYBCZ5QEMBVQ0

forward_patch:
--- original
+++ modified
@@ -16,6 +16,26 @@
     - TDD: tests/db.rs + tests/file.rs integration tests (CompiledAssertion fields are public, so locators built directly).
     Not attempting prose->SQL/file compilation in compile() — out of scope; locators are hand-authorable per the design's reviewer-edit story.
   timestamp: 2026-06-27T11:44:05.912146+00:00
+- actor: claude-code
+  id: 01kw4f2a06vzzsdrtg21b8z7s0
+  text: |-
+    Implemented and green (left in doing for review).
+
+    Files changed:
+    - NEW crates/swissarmyhammer-expect/src/surface/db.rs (DbAdapter, rusqlite bundled): provision fresh temp-file/in-memory sqlite + load setup: fixture SQL; drive=run statements; observe=deterministic SQL dump snapshot (CREATE+INSERT, ORDER BY all columns, non-finite REAL round-trip); teardown drops conn+TempDir.
+    - NEW crates/swissarmyhammer-expect/src/surface/file.rs (FileAdapter): provision scratch TempDir + setup fixtures; drive `write <path> <content>`/`mkdir <path>` via shared safe_join (no traversal); observe walks tree -> FileState{files,dirs}; teardown drops scratch.
+    - NEW tests/db.rs, tests/file.rs (integration: provision->drive->observe->locator resolve->evaluate).
+    - types.rs: additive SurfaceState::Db(DbState{snapshot}) + SurfaceState::File(FileState{files,dirs}) + round-trip tests.
+    - assertion.rs: locator additions Locator::Sql{query} (SQL projection; reloads snapshot into in-mem sqlite), Locator::FileContent{path}, Locator::FileJsonPath{path,pointer} (json sub-locator); resolve()/Display arms; query_snapshot/bound_from_sql_value; extended the 5 SurfaceState state-view helpers + new db_state/file_state; inline tests.
+    - surface/mod.rs: shared safe_join + setup_commands; cli.rs safe_output_path delegates.
+    - ledger.rs scrub_state: Db/File arms. lib.rs exports. Cargo.toml: rusqlite + tempfile deps.
+
+    DB client: rusqlite (workspace, bundled) — sync, fits the sync SurfaceAdapter trait. Locator additions: db = SQL-projection (Locator::Sql) resolving against the captured snapshot via an ephemeral in-memory db (evaluate stays pure, no external system); file = path+content (Locator::FileContent) plus json sub-locator (Locator::FileJsonPath).
+
+    Verification: cargo nextest -p swissarmyhammer-expect = 271 passed; targeted -E 'test(db) or test(file) or test(surface) or test(assertion)' = 93 passed; cargo check --workspace ok; cargo clippy -D warnings clean; cargo fmt --check clean.
+
+    double-check returned REVISE with two low-severity db.rs findings, both fixed: (1) row order now pinned with ORDER BY every column for deterministic snapshots; (2) non-finite REAL values render as 9e999/-9e999 so a snapshot with ±Inf stays self-reloadable (added round-trip tests for both).
+  timestamp: 2026-06-27T11:57:29.990013+00:00
 depends_on:
 - 01KW262DJSSC1JX2FXCDQN0X4E
 - 01KW265D8SHMBFYBCZ5QEMBVQ0
